scope.summary: Make doctor checks 1, 2, 12, 13, and 15 state precisely whether their result is a configuration, filesystem, compile-time, or provenance observation.
out_of_scope: Live Oracle socket-option probing, which offline doctor deliberately does not perform.
Changing doctor checks already verified as live observations.

entry_points.name: offline doctor evidence-source report
entry_points.trace: scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 600 -- env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp-target/ws-b-b8d-evidence cargo test -p oraclemcp-core doctor::tests: 55 focused doctor tests passed in the dedicated clean worktree at c378dcab0a5e0e687cb1ade879840d50b13cc264, including observation_only_checks_name_their_evidence_source, positive_call_timeout_passes, positive_keepalive_minutes_passes, and audit_posture_is_not_inferred_from_the_default_audit_path.

limitations: The offline doctor explicitly labels configuration-derived timeout and keepalive settings; it does not prove a live socket option or Oracle connection round trip.
